TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Rafael_Correa, title = Rafael_Correa, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rafael_Correa} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 4, Rafael Correa, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Ecuador ta' misuw hya' ga Rafael Correa, aring ryax tay 15 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2007 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 4, Rafael Correa, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Ecuador ta' misuw hya' ga Rafael Correa, aring ryax tay 15 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2007 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, ra*ael ʦ~ʨorrea, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw eʦ~ʨua*or taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ra*ael ʦ~ʨorrea, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
